**Best CSP:**

**Best CC:**
GOOGL - $360 strike, 2026-05-15, 16 DTE, $8.00/$8.40, delta 0.39, 53.5% annualized return (existing position)

**Best LEAPS:**
None qualify - All showing poor timing signals with high IVPs (57-85%) and extended/near-high conditions

None available

**IVP Environment:** Elevated volatility across the board (44-85% IVP) creating excellent premium selling opportunities but poor LEAPS buying conditions - perfect environment for income strategies.
